description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white upper with three red stripes on the side panels and a red heel tab. The shoe has a rounded toe, white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and a slightly worn white rubber sole with visible dirt marks, especially around the toe and heel. The tongue displays a red circular logo, and the interior lining appears to be gray with a hint of red at the heel. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic leather and textile materials, with a cushioned collar for comfort. The shoe is designed for casual or sporty urban use, offering both style and practicality. The visible wear and dirt indicate it has been used outdoors, likely on city streets or sidewalks.
description: A white low-top sneaker with red stripes and heel tab, featuring a criss-cross lace pattern and visible signs of outdoor wear. The shoe combines synthetic leather and textile materials for a sporty, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, white laces in a criss-cross pattern, and the red logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the three red stripes, red heel tab, and the slightly dirty white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the red heel tab, gray interior lining, and visible dirt on the heel of the sole.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the three red stripes, red heel tab, and overall shoe profile.
